current_description: Review frontend code for accessibility, UI security, missing states, and UX regressions. Use when asked to review React components, run a pre-merge frontend review, or check a11y and unsafe rendering.

current_candidate.label: Current
current_candidate.description: Review frontend code for accessibility, UI security, missing states, and UX regressions. Use when asked to review React components, run a pre-merge frontend review, or check a11y and unsafe rendering.

baseline.description: Review frontend code for accessibility, risky UI security issues, missing states, and common UX regressions. Use when asked to review React, UI, frontend components, forms, a11y, or pre-merge frontend quality.

dev.threshold_explanation: Prompts at or above the threshold are treated as trigger matches. Scores are driven primarily by semantic intent coverage: packaging intent, workflow-to-skill transformation intent, reuse/distribution intent, and eval intent. Explicit exclusions such as summary-only, translation-only, one-off, document-only, or do-not-build directives apply direct penalties and can override otherwise similar wording.

misfires.prompt: Review this React checkout form for accessibility and risky frontend issues before merge.
Do a frontend review on these UI components and check loading, error, and empty states.
Audit this signup form for a11y, unsafe rendering, and UX regressions.
Review this React diff with a pre-merge mindset and call out UI quality risks.

should_trigger.prompt: Review this React checkout form for accessibility and risky frontend issues before merge.
Do a frontend review on these UI components and check loading, error, and empty states.
Audit this signup form for a11y, unsafe rendering, and UX regressions.
Review this React diff with a pre-merge mindset and call out UI quality risks.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Build a React login page with loading and error states.
Explain how accessibility works in React forms.
Review this backend endpoint and database migration.
Translate these frontend review comments into Japanese.

near_neighbor.prompt: Brainstorm ways to improve this dashboard UX, but do not review code.
Write a frontend review checklist without reviewing the code itself.
Fix the failing validation bug in this form component.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Create a polished React dashboard page from scratch.

candidates.label: Current
candidates.description: Review frontend code for accessibility, UI security, missing states, and UX regressions. Use when asked to review React components, run a pre-merge frontend review, or check a11y and unsafe rendering.

candidates.label: Guardrail
candidates.description: Review frontend code for accessibility, UI security, missing states, and UX regressions from React components, forms, frontend diffs, or UI code. Do not use for building a new page from scratch, backend-only review, or explaining frontend concepts.

candidates.label: Balanced
candidates.description: Review frontend code for accessibility, UI security, missing states, and UX regressions from React components, forms, frontend diffs, or UI code. Use when asked to review React components, run a pre-merge frontend review, or check a11y and unsafe rendering.

candidates.label: Artifact Aware
candidates.description: Review frontend code for accessibility, UI security, missing states, and UX regressions from React components, forms, frontend diffs, or UI code. Trigger when requests mention React components, forms, frontend diffs, or UI code and the job is to review React components, run a pre-merge frontend review, or check a11y and unsafe rendering.

candidates.label: Boundary
candidates.description: Review frontend code for accessibility, UI security, missing states, and UX regressions from React components, forms, frontend diffs, or UI code. Use when asked to review React components, run a pre-merge frontend review, or check a11y and unsafe rendering. Do not use for building a new page from scratch, backend-only review, or explaining frontend concepts.
